title: Mybench Anchor Event (layout v1)
description: One immutable anchor event file at anchors/<identity_id>/<YYYY>/<MM>/<DD>.json (ADR-0004). Strict whitelist of publishable bytes. v2 changes vs the v1 batch artifact: identity_id namespacing, COARSE date instead of second-precision ts (privacy tightening), item_count, client_version. One event per identity per UTC day; files are created once and never modified.

date.description: Coarse time window: the UTC date of the anchor event. Nothing finer is published.

item_count.description: Sum of covered session rows' item counts (capture-event items).

root.description: H('mybench:v1:day' || MTH(covered session roots)), lowercase hex.

chain_tip.description: h of the last covered ledger row (trailing-truncation detector).

client_version.description: mybench client version that produced this event.

device_pub.description: Raw 32-byte Ed25519 device public key, hex — chained to the identity via a signed device-binding record under identities/.

sig.description: Ed25519 device signature over canonical compact sorted JSON without sig.
